<!-- What did you try? Why didn't it work? -->

## Strategy alignment

Have you read [STRATEGY.md](../../STRATEGY.md)?

- [ ] My request is within L1 scope (personal developer brain pool)
- [ ] My request is L2/L3 scope (will be deferred per strategy)
- [ ] My request raises an "open question" not yet covered in [spec §6](../../docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-16-agent-memory-hub-strategy-design.md)
